title: Colourworks Measuring Spoon Set, 5 Spoons for Measuring Food, Durable, Stain Resistant and Dishwasher Safe Plastic, Bright Colours, Brights
features: What You'll Get - Set of 5 measuring spoons for accurate measurements of flour, sugar, spices, herbs, and more. Includes quarter tsp, half a tsp, one tsp, half a tbsp, and one tbsp spoon with markings.

Versatile Kitchen Gadget - Ideal for home cooks and professional chefs, perfect for baking, cooking, and meal prepping. Offers accurate measurements in a range of sizes to meet all your measuring needs.
Colour Coded and Stain Resistant - Easy to identify with a color-coded design and safe to use with strong spices. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.
Essential for any kitchen - Set of Measuring Spoons with bright and vibrant colors make them a fun and stylish addition to your kitchen gadget collection. Colors may vary from those shown.
Durable and Guaranteed: High-quality plastic construction for long-lasting durability, with a 5-year guarantee for peace of mind. Ideal for daily use in a busy kitchen.
description: From the manufacturer Colourworks 5 Piece Measuring Spoon Set All you need to measure your ingredients when following recipes and brighten up your kitchen at the same time. This five piece measuring spoon set includes ¼ tsp, ½ tsp, 1 tsp, ½ tbsp and 1 tbsp measurements as well as the equivalent ml units. Each spoon features a key Colourworks colour, so you can combine them with other items in the range to mix and match your kitchen in a striking array of colours. Features & Benefits Dishwasher safe Stain resistant
